query: MongoDB write throughput real-time analytics 50000 events per second performance 2024
answer: MongoDB can handle up to 50,000 write operations per second with proper configuration. Performance depends on hardware, indexes, and journaling settings. MongoDB 8.0 offers enhanced performance and scalability.

results.title: Essential Guide to Real Time Analytics | MongoDB
results.snippet: # What is Real-Time Analytics? ### What does a real-time analytics platform mean? ### What is an example use case of real-time data analytics? ### Why is real-time analytics important? Businesses that use real-time analytics can react more quickly to market changes than those that wait on batch processing reports. ### Who uses real-time analytics? Real-time analytics has moved far beyond a niche tool; it’s now part of how many industries operate day to day. In finance, it powers instant fraud detection and processes the data generated to keep payment systems secure. Retailers use real-time analytics to personalize offers on the fly or replenish inventory before a shortage hits. ### What is the best database for real-time analytics? MongoDB works well when you need to query live application datathrough a real-time OLAP database without moving it into a warehouse first. ### What are the main challenges in implementing real-time analytics?

results.title: MongoDB.local London 2024: Better Applications, Faster | MongoDB
results.snippet: # MongoDB.local London 2024: Better Applications, Faster. Yesterday marked the nineteenth stop of the 2024 MongoDB.local tour, and we had a blast welcoming folks across industries to MongoDB.local London, where we discussed the latest technology trends, celebrated customer innovations, and unveiled product updates that make it easier than ever for developers to build next-gen applications. MongoDB is committed to ensuring that our products are built to exceed our customers’ most stringent requirements, and that they provide the strongest possible foundation for building a wide range of applications, now and in the future. The biggest news at .local London was the general availability of MongoDB 8.0, which provides significant performance improvements, reduced scaling costs, and adds additional scalability, resilience, and data security capabilities to the world’s most popular document database. For more on MongoDB.local London’s product announcements—which are designed to accelerate application development, simplify AI innovation, and speed developer upskilling—please read on!
